    placeOrder(List) - Method in class org.novastack.iposca.ord.services.OrderSaFacade
     
    postSuspended(CustomerDebt) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.debt.DAUtils
    Check that the second reminder has been sent and that it is the last day of the month, so that if the debt still remains unpaid, the account status of the debtor will change from suspended to in-default.

    Returns the value of the price record component.
